chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Appl. No.S–125 of 2025. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE. 1. For orders on O/objection at flag-A. 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail. 14.07.2025. None present for applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General. ******** Notice issued to complainant Imdad Ali returned by SHO Shaheed Murtaza Meerani, duly served. Complainant is called absent. It appears that none was present on behalf of the applicant on the last date of hearing nor did anyone appear on the subsequent date. Today once again (third occasion) none has appeared and no intimation has been received. Perusal of record reveals that Counsel for applicant is reluctant to pursue the instant bail application, it is therefore, dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Ihsan/P.S.
